# How to Choose a Community SDK for Your Mobile App in 2026 Today

Meta description: A practical guide to choosing a community SDK for your mobile app, focused on what tradeoffs actually matter at scale.
Slug: how-to-choose-community-sdk-mobile-app
Alt text: Diagram of community SDK options ranked by integration effort and feature coverage
Category: Community
Tags: Community

Choosing a community SDK for your mobile app comes down to four tradeoffs, but most teams only consider two of them before they pick.

### What a community SDK actually covers

Most community SDKs handle moderation, role assignment, and feeds. A few handle realtime presence. Almost none handle community-specific notifications.

### How integration effort differs

Single-SDK approaches save engineering cycles but lock you into one vendor's data model.

### Which tradeoff matters most for your app

Depends on whether you're optimizing for time-to-market or long-term flexibility.
